entry_transition.notes: Dissolve from dense vegetation threshold (M4 exit) into the shaking-bush tension of M5. Maintains spatial continuity — player already inside the jungle, now deeper. Audio bridge: ambient forest sounds carry through, punctuated by the new heavy breathing/branch-snapping cues.

exit_handoff.leaves_on: Player in high-alert stance, tool drawn (whichever chosen), facing right toward the now-silent bush. Tension peaks then releases as threat passes or retreats — body language shifts from defensive readiness to cautious relief. Final frame: player turning away from the threat zone, checkpoint text 'השטח נקי' appearing as vegetation opens ahead.
exit_handoff.next_scene_should_open_with: Immediate environmental release: transition from claustrophobic undergrowth to 'דרך פתוחה יותר' — wider sightlines, lighter canopy, easier breathing room. Player's posture relaxing slightly but still vigilant, moving forward into the cleared path. Emotional pivot from adrenaline-spike to cautious progress.

mood_arc: M4 ended with enclosing vegetation and threshold anxiety; M5 escalates that into immediate physical threat (shaking bush, unseen predator), spiking adrenaline to mission-peak. Resolves with threat averted and terrain opening — a hard-earned exhale before next challenge.
visual_callbacks: Dense vegetation from M4 threshold persists in M5 foreground (shaking bushes), reinforcing we're still deep in the jungle entered last mission
Player's alert body language continues M4's tension but now weaponized — hand moves from cautious exploration (M4) to defensive tool-draw (M5)
Filtered/dappled light quality from M4's 'אווירה משתנה' carries into M5's late-afternoon photorealistic lighting, maintaining time-of-day continuity
rationale: M4→M5 is a single continuous jungle penetration: threshold crossed (M4) → threat encountered (M5). Cross-dissolve preserves spatial flow without jarring cuts. Exit handoff sets up M5→M6 environmental contrast (enclosed→open path) and emotional shift (peak tension→relief), giving next mission clear visual/emotional anchor to build from.
